descriptions.en:
Earth: Revival is a sci-fi TPS survival game set in 2112, available for iOS/Android/PC.
On an Earth ravaged by Tox, a mysterious alien entity, explore a vast open world with deserts, urban ruins, wetlands, and snowy peaks. Try your best to survive in the harsh environments and ever-changing conditions! Collect wood, ore, and food to craft items, weapons, and havens.
Wield futuristic weapons and pilot Power Armors as the Earth's last hope to resist alien creatures and take down evil organizations. Protect the Earth with your friends and restore human civilization!

descriptions.en:
A revolutionary strategy game made for the mobile generation. MARVEL SNAP is the fastest way to play with your favorite MARVEL heroes and villains. 
Get powerful cards, build your deck, and lead your heroes to victory in fast, action-packed, strategic battles. 
You can enjoy the game at 12 languages, across 31 markets in Asia, Europe and Americas.
Currently available on iOS, Android, and Steam.
